setup.title: Baldur's Gate 3 - ToT Setup Guide
setup.description: Install the Trials-first BG3 Archipelago build, enable the merged BG3 mod, and start a seed.

errors.local_progression_overflow: This slot generates more local progression items than it has locations available. Reduce the Progressive Shop fragment count or add more non-shop checks.
errors.progressive_shop_overflow: Progressive Shop adds {fragment_count} {shop_fragment_item_name} items, but this slot only has {non_shop_location_count} non-shop check locations available to hold them. Increase the clear/kill/perfect/RogueScore check counts, choose a larger Progressive Shop unlock rate, or disable Progressive Shop.

unlock_copies.doc_template:
How many copies of {unlock_name} are included in the randomized AP unlock pool.

Set this to 0 to remove that unlock from the multiworld.

include_equipment_fillers.doc:
Whether one-off equipment filler items from the upstream BG3 equipment pool stay in the AP filler pool.

Disable this to remove those equipment filler items from the multiworld entirely.

goal.doc:
Determines how this BG3 Trials slot wins.

Buy NG+: Purchase the local Quick Start / NG+ unlock from the tav shop.
Clear Stages: Complete the configured number of Trials clears.
Reach RogueScore: Reach the configured RogueScore total.

goal_clear_target.doc: How many successful Trials clears are required when the goal is Clear Stages.

goal_rogue_score_target.doc: How much RogueScore is required when the goal is Reach RogueScore.

goal_ng_plus_fragment_gate_percent.doc:
How much of the Progressive Shop must be unlocked before `NG+` appears in the shop.

If Progressive Shop is disabled, this gate is ignored and `NG+` appears normally.

clear_check_count.doc: How many Archipelago checks can be earned from successful scenario clears.

clear_check_interval.doc: Awards one clear-based check every N successful scenario clears until the count limit is reached.

kill_check_count.doc: How many Archipelago checks can be earned from total enemy kills in Trials.

kill_check_interval.doc: Awards one kill-based check every N total kills until the count limit is reached.

perfect_check_count.doc: How many Archipelago checks can be earned from perfect clears.

perfect_check_interval.doc: Awards one perfect-clear check every N perfect clears until the count limit is reached.

roguescore_check_count.doc: How many Archipelago checks can be earned from RogueScore milestones.

roguescore_check_interval.doc: Awards one RogueScore-based check every N RogueScore until the count limit is reached.

shop_check_count.doc:
Targets at least N randomized AP shop checks from ``trials_unlock_catalog.json``.

Buying one of these entries sends a location check instead of granting the reward immediately.
The original reward becomes an AP item that must be received from the multiworld.

The world will automatically expand above this value when needed so every configured
non-filler unlock copy still appears somewhere in the randomized item pool.

progressive_shop.doc:
Locks randomized AP shop checks behind progressive ``Shop Fragment`` items.

Each received Shop Fragment unlocks the next visible section of the tav shop until the
whole randomized shop is available.

progressive_shop_unlock_rate.doc:
How much of the randomized AP shop each received Shop Fragment unlocks.

Lower values create more Shop Fragments and finer-grained shop progression.
This option only affects generation when Progressive Shop is enabled.

shop_price_minimum.doc:
Minimum seeded random price for AP shop entries.

Prices are rounded to multiples of 10, and NG+ keeps its vanilla local cost.

shop_price_maximum.doc:
Maximum seeded random price for AP shop entries.

Prices are rounded to multiples of 10, and NG+ keeps its vanilla local cost.

permanent_buff_target.doc:
Chooses who receives character-bound useful AP unlock rewards.

User Character: Gives the reward to the receiving player's chosen character.
Random Party Member: Gives the reward to one random active party member.
All Party Members: Gives the reward to every active party member.

Progression rewards ignore this setting and still keep their whole-party or global behavior.

vanilla_pixie_blessing_in_shop.doc:
Restores Pixie Blessing as a normal local shop unlock instead of randomizing it into the AP pool.

When enabled, Moonshield is removed from the randomized shop check pool and the vanilla 30-cost shop entry stays local.

death_link_trigger.doc:
Chooses what local Trials death condition sends a DeathLink.

Full Party Wipe: Sends when every active party member is dead or downed.
Any Party Kill: Sends when any active party member fully dies.
Any Party Downed: Sends when any active party member is downed.

death_link_punishment.doc:
Chooses what happens locally when this slot receives a DeathLink.

Kill All Party Members: Wipes the active party, companions, and summons to force a reload.
Down Random Party Member: Downs one random active party member or companion.
Kill Random Party Member: Fully kills one random active party member or companion.
Remove All Resources - All: Drains every tracked resource from the whole active party and companions,
including spell slots, actions, bonus actions, movement, rage charges, Channel Divinity, sorcery points,
and similar class resources.
Remove All Resources - Random: Drains every tracked resource from one random active party member or companion,
including spell slots, actions, bonus actions, movement, rage charges, Channel Divinity, sorcery points,
and similar class resources.
Remove All Actions - All: Removes only actions, bonus actions, and movement from the whole active party and companions.
Remove All Actions - Random: Removes only actions, bonus actions, and movement from one random active
party member or companion.
Nothing: Receives the DeathLink notification but applies no local punishment.

traps_percentage.doc: Percent chance that filler slots become traps instead of helpful filler rewards.

enabled_traps.doc:
Which trap types are allowed in the filler pool.

Monster traps are still the least proven option and may need extra testing in Trials.

parser.description: BG3 Пробний клієнт для текстового інтерфейсу.
parser.bridge_mode_help: Запускайте без автономного інтерфейсу користувача та приймайте команди з внутрішньоігрової вкладки Archipelago.

startup.missing_bg3_folder:
BG3Client не вдалося визначити шлях до папки Baldur's Gate 3.
Спробуйте встановити значення «root_directory» у локальному файлі параметрів для папки BG3.
startup.missing_script_extender:
BG3Client не зміг знайти папку Script Extender у вашій установці BG3.[
Переконайтеся, що Script Extender встановлено, а BG3 запущено принаймні один раз відтоді.

status.runtime_running: Запущене середовище виконання клієнта. Для підключення використовуйте вкладку Archipelago у грі.
status.tot_client_ready: ToT Клієнт відкрито. Натисніть Connect тут або у вікні клієнта.
status.connection_closed: Підключення закрито. Клієнт ToT все ще відкритий; натисніть Connect, щоб повторити спробу.

errors.slot_required: Перед підключенням потрібно ввести назву слота.
errors.reconnect_disabled: Автоматичне повторне підключення вимкнено. Натисніть Підключитися, щоб повторити спробу.

logs.keep_window_open: Тримайте це вікно виконання відкритим, поки ви граєте в BG3.
logs.connect_from_client_or_tab: ToT Клієнт відкрито. Підключіться тут або на вкладці Archipelago у грі.
logs.window_close_stops_client: Закриття цього вікна клієнта зупиняє клієнт Archipelago.
logs.connection_closed: Підключення закрито. Автоматичне повторне підключення вимкнено; натисніть Connect, щоб повторити спробу.
logs.disconnect_requested: Запит на відключення надійшов на вкладці Archipelago у грі.
logs.resync_requested_while_disconnected: Запит на повторну синхронізацію під час відключення.
logs.resync_requested: Запит на повторну синхронізацію вручну на вкладці Archipelago у грі.
